subject: [PATCH] vfs: remove externs from fs.h on functions modified by i_ino widening

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the impact of removing externs on backporting, suggesting a limited approach to avoid merge conflicts. Open to a one-time cleanup patch in the future.

2026-03-07.patch_summary: Proposal to remove externs from fs.h on functions modified by i_ino widening, considering backporting implications.
